description_long: This triumphal arch is a monumental structure with a single large central archway, flanked by two robust piers. The facade is adorned with two sculpted human figures standing on pedestals at the base of each pier, adding a sense of grandeur and historical significance. Above the arch, a prominent entablature is topped with a projecting cornice, and a decorative relief featuring a winged motif is centered above the archway. The structure is primarily dark in color, with the sculptural elements rendered in a lighter tone, creating a striking contrast. The overall form is solid and geometric, with clean lines and minimal ornamentation aside from the sculptures and relief. The back of the arch is plain, lacking the decorative features seen on the front.
description: A monumental triumphal arch with a single central archway, flanked by sculpted figures and a decorative relief above. The structure is mostly dark with contrasting light sculptures and minimal ornamentation.
description_view_0: Front view showing the central archway, two sculpted figures at the base, and a decorative relief above the arch.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the depth of the structure and the projecting cornice, with minimal visible detail.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a plain surface with the archway opening, lacking decorative elements.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, showing the structure's depth and silhouette.
